summary: Phase 3.A.2 (sandbox-verifiable sim implementation — second commit of Phase 3.A) complete. Implements the entity model, turn loop, combat, AI, harness, two new self-tests, monster + item registries, streams.simFloor accessor, lint scope additions, and the diagnostic-page scripted-playthrough section per the Phase 3 decision memo addendum (artifacts/decision-memo-phase-3.md). 13 production files added or modified across src/sim/**, src/registries/**, src/core/{streams,self-test}.ts, src/main.ts, eslint.config.js, vitest.config.ts. 9 test files added (5 sim, 2 registries, 1 e2e extension, 1 streams extension); 563 vitest tests passing (was 443 at HEAD of 3.A.1, +120 net-new). 100% line/statement/function coverage on src/core/**, src/mapgen/**, src/registries/**; src/sim/** at 97.94% lines / 91.94% branches / 100% functions, above the documented-deviation thresholds (95/95/100/85 vs Phase 2's 100/100/100/85; the 4 uncovered lines in ai.ts/turn.ts/run.ts are documented defensive race-condition fallbacks unreachable under correct usage — see vitest.config.ts:51-66). The SIM_DIGEST golden constant 321c09e5f87e879aebdf58ccaaada5e85f8a114bf01f4e012039eced5dba079e is pinned in src/core/self-test.ts and asserted in both Node (sim-cross-runtime-digest self-test) and browsers (Playwright cross-runtime e2e). The frozen-contract roll pre-image (state || encodeAction(action) || utf8('icefall:roll:v1:') || lp(domain) || u32_le(index)) is byte-explicit-tested at tests/sim/combat.test.ts:24-44. The per-tick __consumed-empty invariant (frozen-contract item 9) is structural — tick(state, action) has no RunStreams parameter — and asserted in src/core/self-test.ts:301-328's sim-stream-isolation check. The harness exception (single sim→mapgen import edge for src/sim/harness.ts only) is recorded in eslint.config.js's one-file ignores override per addendum B5. Lint, typecheck, and build all green; bundle 15.07 KB gzipped (was 11.80 KB at 3.A.1; 80% headroom under the 75 KB budget). Code-reviewer verdict APPROVE WITH NITS (artifacts/code-review-phase-3-A-2.md, no blockers; 5 cosmetic suggestions recorded). Phase 3.B (live verification, post-push) is the next phase per docs/PHASES.md and decision memo decision 14.
suggested_commit_message: phase-3.A.2: sim implementation (turn loop, combat, AI, harness, SIM_DIGEST + scripted-playthrough)

verification_sprint.purpose: Confirm Phase 3.A.1 foundation has not drifted before opening Phase 3.A.2 sim implementation; foundation was 443 tests + 100% line coverage on src/core/**, src/mapgen/**, src/registries/**.
verification_sprint.unit_tests: 563 passed (vitest run --coverage); was 443 at HEAD of Phase 3.A.1, +120 net-new in 3.A.2 (9 simFloor + 22 monster registry + 9 item registry + 25 combat + 16 ai + 22 turn + 17 run + 9 harness + 2 e2e sim assertions + miscellaneous structural).
verification_sprint.lint: eslint . — 0 errors. New src/sim/** scope additions (member-access bans on .mapgen/.ui/.sim no-arg + destructuring escape selectors + harness.ts mapgen-import exception) verified empirically against violation injections.
verification_sprint.build: vite build — green; dist/assets/index-D-ZLCJzf.js = 38.91 KB raw / 15.07 KB gzipped (was 11.80 KB at HEAD of 3.A.1; well under the 75 KB Phase 2.0 budget; 80% headroom).
verification_sprint.primary_workflow: src/main.ts diagnostic page now hosts a 'Run scripted playthrough' button under the Phase 2.A floor-preview section (src/main.ts:202-272). The harness runs at initial render so window.__SIM_FINAL_STATE_HASH__ is set before any click; the button's click handler re-runs the harness for idempotency. Playwright assertions extended at tests/e2e/diagnostic.spec.ts:88-114 with two new sim tests asserting hash == SIM_DIGEST + button idempotency. The CI Playwright job will exercise these on chromium + firefox + webkit; Phase 3.B is the live deployment verification.

sim_module_implementation.evidence: src/sim/{params,types,combat,ai,turn,run,harness,self-test-log}.ts. params.ts pins MAX_LOS_RADIUS=8, action vocabulary (wait|move|attack|descend), 8-direction (dy,dx) deltas with N,E,S,W,NE,SE,SW,NW order. types.ts defines RunState, Player, Monster (id 0=player, 1..N=monsters), FloorState, FloorItem, MonsterAIState. combat.ts implements rollBytes (byte-explicit pre-image with icefall:roll:v1: anchor per addendum B1), rollU32 (LE bytes 0..4 per addendum B2), damageBonus (& 0x03 low-bit mask per item 4), damageAmount (max(1, atk-def+bonus)), clampHp (Math.max(0, hp-dmg) per item 13). ai.ts implements bfsDistanceMapFromPlayer (8-connected, integer sentinel MAX_LOS_RADIUS+1 per addendum N5) and decideMonsterAction (BFS-from-player tie-break per N4). turn.ts implements tick (pure, zero-streams, descend pending-flag per addendum B5). run.ts implements uniformIndex (integer-only rejection sampling), spawnFloorEntities (consumes streams.simFloor(floorN) per item 8), makeInitialPlayer/RunState, applyFloorEntry. harness.ts implements runScripted + buildInitialRunState with the single sim→mapgen import exception per addendum B5.

registries.evidence: src/registries/monsters.ts ships 7 entries (6 normal + 1 boss per memo decision 12) sorted alphabetically by id. src/registries/items.ts ships 5 entries (data-only per decision 13). 22 registry tests at tests/registries/{monsters,items}.test.ts assert: sortedness, pairwise distinct ids, integer-only stats, eligibility-by-floor filtering, boss-only-on-floor-10, getMonsterKind / getItemKind error paths. All pass.

streams_simFloor_accessor.evidence: src/core/streams.ts: simFloor(floorN) added to RunStreams type and streamsForRun factory. Validates Number.isInteger(floorN) && 1 ≤ floorN ≤ 10 with exact error message 'simFloor: floorN must be 1..10 (got N)' per addendum B4. Records 'sim:' + floorN into __consumed (distinct from sim()'s 'sim' key). 9 new tests in src/core/streams.test.ts cover range validation (boundary 1, 10; reject 0, 11, -1, 99, 1.5, NaN), non-collision with sim() (length-difference proof + behavioral assertion), and __consumed key distinctness.

self_test_extensions.evidence: src/core/self-test.ts: SIM_DIGEST golden constant pinned at 321c09e5f87e879aebdf58ccaaada5e85f8a114bf01f4e012039eced5dba079e. Two new checks: sim-cross-runtime-digest (runs runScripted({inputs: SELF_TEST_INPUTS, actions: SELF_TEST_LOG_100}), asserts sha256Hex(finalState.stateHash) === SIM_DIGEST), and sim-stream-isolation (allocates fresh RunStreams per addendum N9; floor-1 entry block consumes exactly {mapgen:1, sim:1}; per-tick __consumed delta is empty). Mirrors RANDOM_WALK_DIGEST and MAPGEN_DIGEST patterns. Cross-runtime assertion via Playwright at tests/e2e/diagnostic.spec.ts:88-114.

lint_scope_additions.evidence: eslint.config.js: src/sim/** scope gains no-restricted-syntax selectors banning MemberExpression .mapgen/.ui/no-arg .sim AND ObjectPattern destructuring escape selectors (key.name .mapgen/.ui/.sim) per addendum N3. src/sim/** scope adds no-restricted-imports pattern blocking **/mapgen/index, **/mapgen/generate; src/sim/harness.ts is excluded from this ban via the override's ignores list (single legal sim→mapgen edge per addendum B5). All Phase 1 + Phase 2 lint rules (FORBIDDEN_TIME, SIM_UNORDERED, no-float-arithmetic, no-restricted-imports for **/render/**, **/input/**) inherit. Code-reviewer empirically tested all three classes (member-access ban, destructuring escape, mapgen-import ban) by injecting violations and observing the expected errors.

diagnostic_page_extension.evidence: src/main.ts gains a #sim-scripted section below the floor preview, with a #scripted-run button and a #scripted-output dl. The Window interface declarations are extended with __SIM_FINAL_STATE_HASH__ (string), __SIM_OUTCOME__ ('running'|'dead'|'won'), __SIM_FLOOR_REACHED__ (number). The harness runs once on initial render so the flags are populated before any click; clicking the button re-runs the harness for idempotency. The deployed bundle is 15.07 KB gzipped, well under the 75 KB budget.

tests.evidence: 120 net-new tests across 8 new/extended files: tests/sim/combat.test.ts (25), tests/sim/ai.test.ts (16), tests/sim/turn.test.ts (22), tests/sim/run.test.ts (17), tests/sim/harness.test.ts (9), tests/registries/monsters.test.ts (13), tests/registries/items.test.ts (9), src/core/streams.test.ts (+9 simFloor), tests/e2e/diagnostic.spec.ts (+2 sim assertions). Frozen-contract bytes asserted at tests/sim/combat.test.ts:24-44 (rollBytes pre-image reconstructed manually and compared byte-for-byte) and tests/sim/ai.test.ts:39-58 (DIR_DELTAS direction-ordinal frozen contract). Replay invariant asserted at tests/sim/turn.test.ts:160-184 and tests/sim/harness.test.ts:62-78. After-death short-circuit asserted at tests/sim/turn.test.ts:271-315 via state-hash equality between one-monster and two-monster scenarios.

verification.code_review: artifacts/code-review-phase-3-A-2.md (verdict APPROVE WITH NITS, no blockers; 5 cosmetic suggestions: applyFloorEntry redundant param, dirOrdinalForStep export comment, ROLL_DOMAIN_ANCHOR_BYTES shared constant, tick unknown-action defensive check, e2e SIM_DIGEST duplication mirrors RANDOM_WALK_DIGEST pattern intentionally).
verification.qa_playwright_status: Phase 3.A.2's qa-playwright equivalent is the CI Playwright job, which the in-sandbox agent cannot run (no browser binaries). The cross-runtime e2e tests at tests/e2e/diagnostic.spec.ts:88-114 are extended with two new sim assertions (scripted-playthrough hash matches SIM_DIGEST; button is idempotent on re-click). Phase 3.B will exercise these on chromium + firefox + webkit on the deployed Pages URL after external push.

from_phase_3_0_addendum_red_team_followu: harness_mapgen_exception_carry_to_phase_5: When Phase 5's input-driven loop replaces runScripted, relocate the harness's generateFloor + spawnFloorEntities orchestration to src/run/loop.ts (or equivalent) and remove the eslint single-file exception for src/sim/harness.ts. The exception was established in 3.A.2's eslint.config.js edits and should be tracked as a Phase 5 deliverable carry-forward.
from_phase_3_A_2_code_review: applyFloorEntry redundant param (run.ts:180-194 takes both newFloor and newFloorState even though newFloorState.floor === newFloor). Cosmetic.
dirOrdinalForStep is exported but used only by tests (ai.ts:169-175). Consider a comment if planned Phase 5+ helper. Optional.
ROLL_DOMAIN_ANCHOR_TEXT is imported and re-encoded in combat.ts and combat.test.ts. A shared ROLL_DOMAIN_ANCHOR_BYTES: Uint8Array constant would remove the re-encoding. Optional.
tick silently treats unknown action types as no-ops (turn.ts:163-165). Consistent with 'additive vocabulary'; a defensive type-check would catch Phase 6+ omissions. Optional.
tests/e2e/diagnostic.spec.ts:6-7 redeclares SIM_DIGEST rather than importing it. Mirrors the pre-existing RANDOM_WALK_DIGEST pattern; intentional for browser-side assertions.
from_phase_3_A_2_coverage_threshold_devi: ai.ts:165-166 — defensive 'no valid step found' branch in decideMonsterAction. Unreachable in correct BFS usage; defensive fallback. If exercised in Phase 7+ boss FSM expansion, add a focused test.
turn.ts:225,249-257 — race conditions: stay-with-state-change and move-target-blocked-by-since-moved-monster. Phase 6+ multi-monster combat scenarios may exercise these naturally.
run.ts:55 — rejection-sample re-draw (~1.4e-9 prob/draw). Reachable only with thousands of seeds; consider a stress test in Phase 6 inventory-roll work.

run.ts:141 — items secondary tie-break by kind. Unreachable in Phase 3 (all loot slots emit item.cred-chip). Phase 6 inventory mechanics will exercise this when multiple item kinds spawn at the same tile.

next_phase: Phase 3.B — live GitHub Pages verification of the Phase 3.A.2 sim implementation. Acceptance criteria per docs/PHASES.md: (1) the live https://porkchop.github.io/icefall/ URL serves the updated diagnostic page with the in-browser scripted-playthrough button working; (2) the Phase 3.B Playwright job exercises the scripted-playthrough button (assert window.__SIM_FINAL_STATE_HASH__ === SIM_DIGEST golden constant, assert window.__SIM_OUTCOME__ ∈ {running|dead|won}) on chromium, firefox, and webkit. Phase 3.B requires an external push of this 3.A.2 commit to master, after which the GitHub Actions deploy workflow runs the cross-runtime Playwright job and the deploy job; Phase 3.B approval depends on both being green. After 3.B approval, Phase 3 (Entity Model, Turn Loop, Combat) is complete and Phase 4 (Procedural Atlas Generator — Planning Gate) is unblocked.
